cad_specification:
from cadquery import Workplane

# US Ring Size 7 = 17.3mm inner diameter
# Band thickness = 2mm, so outer diameter = 21.3mm
# Major radius for torus = (17.3 + 2) / 2 = 9.65mm
# Minor radius for torus (band cross-section) = 1mm

# Create the ring band as a torus
ring_band = (Workplane("XY")
    .moveTo(9.65, 0)  # Move to major radius from center
    .circle(1)  # Create circle with 1mm radius (2mm diameter band)
    .revolve(360, (0, 0, 0), (0, 0, 1))  # Revolve around Z-axis
)
